title: Supply Chain Management for E-commerce
description:
This course introduces the fundamentals of supply chain management in the fast-growing e-commerce sector. Learners will explore core supply chain components, strategies for sourcing and fulfillment, and the integration of technology and sustainability to optimize operations. Through practical insights and real-world applications, the course equips participants to address challenges unique to digital commerce and build resilient, efficient supply chains.

Designed for emerging entrepreneurs, small business owners, and professionals exploring a career transition into e-commerce, the course requires no prior experience—only curiosity about how online businesses operate.

By the end, learners will understand how effective supply chain management supports growth, improves customer satisfaction, and creates competitive advantage in the e-commerce marketplace, preparing them to make informed decisions that strengthen business performance.
